## Scope

- Owned paths:
- Synthetic data only: yes/no

## Validation

- [ ] Read-only checks run, or reason skipped:
- [ ] `pnpm verify:select -- --files <changed paths...>` considered for focused validation.
- [ ] `pnpm ci:local` run for root config, local gate, lockfile, schema, auth/security, or broad changes.
- [ ] `pnpm deps:audit` run for dependency, security, or release-readiness changes.

## Privacy and Policy

- [ ] No client, matter, credential, payment, or private deployment data included.
- [ ] New dependencies or copied excerpts follow `docs/license-policy.md`.
- [ ] Docs or skill references updated when workflow, API, deployment, or validation behavior changed.
